channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [Anthropic] Donating our open-source alignment tool
item.description: Donating our open-source alignment tool

item.title: [Anthropic] Introducing the Model Context Protocol
item.description: Introducing the Model Context Protocol

item.title: [Simon Willison] llm-gemini 0.31
item.description: llm-gemini 0.31

item.title: [Hacker News] Dirtyfrag: Universal Linux LPE
item.description: Dirtyfrag: Universal Linux LPE

item.title: [Hacker News] AI Slop Is Killing Online Communities
item.description: AI Slop Is Killing Online Communities

item.title: [Simon Willison] Behind the Scenes Hardening Firefox with Claude Mythos Preview
item.description: Behind the Scenes Hardening Firefox with Claude Mythos Preview

item.title: [Hacker News] Natural Language Autoencoders: Turning Claude's Thoughts into Text
item.description: Natural Language Autoencoders: Turning Claude's Thoughts into Text

item.title: [Simon Willison] Notes on the xAI/Anthropic data center deal
item.description: Notes on the xAI/Anthropic data center deal

item.title: [Anthropic] Natural Language Autoencoders
item.description: Natural Language Autoencoders

item.title: [Hacker News] Agents need control flow, not more prompts
item.description: Agents need control flow, not more prompts

item.title: [Hacker News] Chrome removes claim of On-device Al not sending data to Google Servers
item.description: Chrome removes claim of On-device Al not sending data to Google Servers

item.title: [Interconnects] Notes from inside China's AI labs
item.description: Notes from inside China's AI labs

item.title: [Hacker News] DeepSeek 4 Flash local inference engine for Metal
item.description: DeepSeek 4 Flash local inference engine for Metal

item.title: [Hacker News] Motherboard sales are now collapsing amid unprecedented shortages fueled by AI
item.description: Motherboard sales are now collapsing amid unprecedented shortages fueled by AI

item.title: [Hacker News] AlphaEvolve: Gemini-powered coding agent scaling impact across fields
item.description: AlphaEvolve: Gemini-powered coding agent scaling impact across fields

item.title: [OpenAI] Scaling Trusted Access for Cyber with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber
item.description: Scaling Trusted Access for Cyber with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber

item.title: [OpenAI] Parloa builds service agents customers want to talk to
item.description: Parloa builds service agents customers want to talk to

item.title: [GitHub Trending] z-lab/dflash — DFlash: Block Diffusion for Flash Speculative Decoding
item.description: DFlash presents a block diffusion method for flash speculative decoding in language models.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/VectifyAI — 📑 PageIndex: Document Index for Vectorless, Reasoning-based RAG
item.description: PageIndex is a document indexing system enabling reasoning-based RAG without relying on vector databases.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] vercel-labs/open-agents — An open source template for building cloud agents.
item.description: Vercel Labs releases open source template for building cloud agents.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] decolua/9router — 🆓 Unlimited FREE AI coding. Connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline, Copilot, Antigravity to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini via 40+ providers. Auto-fallback, RTK -40% tokens, never hit limits.
item.description: 9router routes requests from coding tools to free AI models via 40+ providers with auto-fallback capabilities.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] aaif-goose/goose — an open source, extensible AI agent that goes beyond code suggestions - install, execute, edit, and test with any LLM
item.description: Goose is an open-source, extensible AI agent supporting code installation, execution, editing, and testing across any LLM.

item.title: [Anthropic] Focus areas for The Anthropic Institute
item.description: Focus areas for The Anthropic Institute

item.title: [OpenAI] Advancing voice intelligence with new models in the API
item.description: Advancing voice intelligence with new models in the API

item.title: [GitHub Trending] BigBodyCobain/Shadowbroker — Open-source intelligence for the global theater. Track everything from the corporate/private jets of the wealthy, and spy satellites, to seismic events in one unified interface. Hook an AI agent up to have it parse through data and find previously unseen correlations. The knowledge is available to all but rarely aggregated in the open, until now.
item.description: Shadowbroker aggregates publicly available intelligence data including corporate jets, satellites, and seismic events in a unified platform for analysis.

item.title: [Hacker News] Making LLM Training Faster with Unsloth and NVIDIA
item.description: Making LLM Training Faster with Unsloth and NVIDIA

item.title: [Latent Space] [AINews] Anthropic-SpaceXai's 300MW/$5B/yr deal for Colossus I, ARR growth is 8000% annualized
item.description: [AINews] Anthropic-SpaceXai's 300MW/$5B/yr deal for Colossus I, ARR growth is 8000% annualized

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Endogenous Regime Switching Driven by Scalar-Irreducible Learning Dynamics
item.description: Scalar-irreducible learning dynamics enable endogenous regime switching through feedback mechanisms, advancing autonomous machine learning without external control.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Self-Attentive Meta-Optimizer with Group-Adaptive Learning Rates and Weight Decay
item.description: MetaAdamW uses self-attention to dynamically adjust per-group learning rates and weight decay, outperforming standard AdamW across diverse tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Transformation Categorization Based on Group Decomposition Theory Using Parameter Division
item.description: New parameter division method categorizes image transformations using group decomposition theory without previous auxiliary assumptions.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Structured Progressive Knowledge Activation for LLM-Driven Neural Architecture Search
item.description: SPARK, a method conditioning LLM edits on specific functional factors, reduces unintended side effects in neural architecture search, achieving 28x speedup and 23% OOD accuracy gains.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] MP-ISMoE: Mixed-Precision Interactive Side Mixture-of-Experts for Efficient Transfer Learning
item.description: MP-ISMoE combines mixed-precision quantization with interactive mixture-of-experts to improve memory-efficient transfer learning for vision-language and language models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Continual Distillation of Teachers from Different Domains
item.description: Continual Distillation paradigm enables students to sequentially learn from diverse teacher models using external data while addressing knowledge forgetting issues.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Lookahead Drifting Model
item.description: Lookahead drifting model sequentially computes drifting terms for improved image generation performance on CIFAR10.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Single-Position Intervention Fails: Distributed Output Templates Drive In-Context Learning
item.description: In-context learning task encoding is fundamentally distributed rather than localized to single positions, despite linear probing suggesting otherwise.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] EdgeRazor: A Lightweight Framework for Large Language Models via Mixed-Precision Quantization-Aware Distillation
item.description: EdgeRazor enables efficient deployment of LLMs on resource-constrained devices through mixed-precision quantization and knowledge distillation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Investigating Trustworthiness of Nonparametric Deep Survival Models for Alzheimer's Disease Progression Analysis
item.description: Study of deep learning survival models for Alzheimer's progression identifies significant demographic bias despite model reliability.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Improving Medical VQA through Trajectory-Aware Process Supervision
item.description: Process-based supervision using DTW-measured reasoning trajectory similarity improves medical VQA accuracy from 59.8% to 68.9%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Designing a double deep reinforcement learning selection tool for resilient demand prediction
item.description: Double deep reinforcement learning agent selects forecasting models for supply chain demand prediction with improved early-stopping convergence.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] LAWS: Learning from Actual Workloads Symbolically -- A Self-Certifying Parametrized Cache Architecture for Neural Inference, Robotics, and Edge Deployment
item.description: LAWS introduces self-certifying neural inference caching that builds expert functions with formal error bounds from actual deployment workloads.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] FlatASCEND: Autoregressive Clinical Sequence Generation with Continuous Time Prediction and Association-Based Pharmacological Testing
item.description: Autoregressive model FlatASCEND partially recovers pharmacological associations from clinical sequences but cannot distinguish mechanistic effects from observational confounding.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Sparse Autoencoder Decomposition of Clinical Sequence Model Representations: Feature Complexity, Task Specialisation, and Mortality Prediction
item.description: Sparse autoencoders applied to clinical EHR models reveal progressive feature abstraction across layers, outperforming dense representations for mortality prediction in some settings.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Confronting Label Indeterminacy in Automated Bail Decisions
item.description: Study evaluates approaches for handling unobserved outcomes in bail decision ML systems, finding all rely on unverifiable assumptions affecting model behavior.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Physics-Aware Framework for Short-Term GPU Power Forecasting of AI Data Centers
item.description: Physics-informed model forecasts AI data center GPU power demand 5-80 minutes ahead with improved accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] RetentiveKV: State-Space Memory for Uncertainty-Aware Multimodal KV Cache Eviction
item.description: RetentiveKV proposes entropy-driven State Space Models for KV cache optimization in multimodal LLMs, achieving 5x compression and 1.5x decoding acceleration.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Regulatory Governance Framework for AI-Driven Financial Fraud Detection in U.S. Banking: Integrating OCC, SR 11-7, CFPB, and FinCEN Compliance Requirements for Model Development, Validation, and Monitoring Lifecycles
item.description: Framework integrates OCC, SR 11-7, CFPB, and FinCEN compliance requirements for AI-driven financial fraud detection with benchmarked models and regulatory monitoring system.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Balanced Aggregation: Understanding and Fixing Aggregation Bias in GRPO
item.description: Researchers propose Balanced Aggregation to improve GRPO training by addressing aggregation bias between token and sequence-level policy gradient methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Validity-Calibrated Reasoning Distillation
item.description: Validity-calibrated reasoning distillation transfers multi-step reasoning from large to small language models by dynamically allocating learning signals based on local reasoning quality.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Efficient Handwriting-Based Alzheimer,s Disease Diagnosis Using a Low-Rank Mixture of Experts Deep Learning Framework
item.description: Low-rank mixture of experts framework uses handwriting analysis for Alzheimer's disease diagnosis with reduced model parameters.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Time series causal discovery with variable lags
item.description: Tabu-based structure learning algorithm infers causal networks from time-series data with edge-specific variable lags, BIC scoring, and theoretical optimality guarantees.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Enhancing the interpretability of spatially variable N2O model predictions with soft sensors during wastewater treatment
item.description: Machine learning models accurately predict N2O emissions from wastewater treatment, but soft sensor predictions are limited by measurement location and dataset uncertainty.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] AsymmetryZero: A Framework for Operationalizing Human Expert Preferences as Semantic Evals
item.description: AsymmetryZero converts human expert preferences into explicit semantic evaluation contracts for post-training AI model assessment.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] FASQ: Flexible Accelerated Subspace Quantization for Calibration-Free LLM Compression
item.description: FASQ provides calibration-free LLM compression using product quantization, offering flexible compression ratios and faster inference than existing quantization methods and FP16.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] HERCULES: Hardware-Efficient, Robust, Continual Learning Neural Architecture Search
item.description: HERCULES proposes a Neural Architecture Search framework balancing hardware efficiency, robustness, and continual learning for real-world AI.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Learning reveals invisible structure in low-rank RNNs
item.description: Research derives reduced-dimensional dynamics for low-rank RNN learning, revealing loss-invisible overlaps that act as memory variables and expose hidden structure.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Simultaneous CNN Approximation on Manifolds with Applications to Boundary Value Problems
item.description: CNNs for manifold approximation and boundary value problems using spectral boundary loss achieve dimension-independent convergence rates, improving over standard PINNs.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Position: the Stochastic Parrot in the Coal Mine. Model Collapse is a Threat to Low-Resource Communities
item.description: Model collapse—performance degradation from training on generated data—disproportionately harms low-resource communities by reducing efficiency and reinforcing cultural biases.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Free Energy-Driven Reinforcement Learning with Adaptive Advantage Shaping for Unsupervised Reasoning in LLMs
item.description: FREIA combines Free Energy-Driven Rewards and Adaptive Advantage Shaping to improve unsupervised reinforcement learning for LLM reasoning tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Adapt to Thrive! Adaptive Power-Mean Policy Optimization for Improved LLM Reasoning
item.description: New method APMPO enhances LLM reasoning by adaptively transitioning between policy optimization strategies and adjusting clipping bounds based on rewards.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Connecting online criminal behavior with machine learning: Using authorship attribution to analyze and link potential online traffickers
item.description: Research uses machine learning authorship attribution to link anonymous online criminals across illegal markets by analyzing consistent patterns in their writing and images.
